nasb.text: Those who were reclining at the table with Him began to say to themselves, “Who is this man who even forgives sins?”

esv.text: Then those who were at table with him began to say among themselves, “Who is this, who even forgives sins?”

cnv.text: 跟他一起吃飯的人心裡說：“這是誰，竟然赦罪呢？”

ccb.text: 同席的人彼此议论说：“这人是谁？竟然能赦免人的罪！”

csbs.text: 那些与他一同坐席的人就心里想：“这个人是谁，竟然赦免罪？”
